evidence.snippet: ● At EvoLogics, we design and manufacture high-end underwater robotics, reliable acoustic communication and positioning networks, and advanced sensor systems for marine applications, combining state-of-the-art engineering with the best ideas found in nature.

From portable surface vehicles to agile underwater explorers, our systems utilize EvoLogics’ advanced acoustic communication networks to coordinate seamlessly, acting as standalone tools or cooperative fleets.

items.notes: EvoLogics designs and manufactures complete AUVs (Quadroin, Poggy) and USVs (Sonobot 5); Quadroin in serial production.
S2C underwater acoustic modems and USBL transceivers sold as standalone product lines.

evidence.snippet: A single unit sensor combines DVL and AHRS / INS for dead-reckoning subsea navigation, enhanced with periodical GNSS fixes from the USBL/LBL acoustic positioning system.

items.notes: USBL/LBL underwater positioning systems, Diver Navigation System, and inertial/DVL navigation integrated in AUVs.

evidence.snippet: The Quadroin’s control software supports the entire mission cycle: interactive, geo-referenced planning of the survey grid; monitoring and control of the mission during deployment; and post-mission download of the full dataset for detailed analysis and multi-format export.

items.notes: SiNAPS Software, EvoLogics AMA, DMACe Modem Emulator — mission planning and control software for AUV operations.

evidence.snippet: ● At EvoLogics, we design and manufacture high-end underwater robotics, reliable acoustic communication and positioning networks, and advanced sensor systems for marine applications, combining state-of-the-art engineering with the best ideas found in nature.

In our Berlin headquarters, we oversee the entire manufacturing process with in-house production, indoor testing facilities, and access to open-water test sites in nearby Brandenburg. Our sales office in Yorktown, Virginia, focuses on product demonstrations, training, and on-site support for North American clients.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Designs and manufactures complete autonomous underwater (AUV) and surface (USV) vehicles; also sells standalone acoustic modems and positioning systems.

items.name: Sonobot 5 USV
items.product_type: uncrewed surface vehicle for hydrographic surveys

evidence.snippet:
The EvoLogics Sonobot 5 is an advanced uncrewed surface vehicle (USV) engineered for automated hydrographic surveys, infrastructure inspections, environmental monitoring or search and rescue operations in inland and coastal waters.
](/autonomous-vehicle/sonobot-5-usv)

items.name: Quadroin AUV
items.product_type: autonomous underwater vehicle — side-scan sonar surveys, serial production

evidence.snippet:
● The EvoLogics Quadroin is an autonomous underwater vehicle (AUV) designed for high-resolution side-scan sonar and camera surveys.
Its bionic, penguin-inspired hull combines hydrodynamic efficiency with high maneuverability, allowing speeds of up to 10 knots while maintaining low energy consumption for extended subsea operations.

items.name: Poggy AUV
items.product_type: autonomous underwater vehicle — Fin-Ray bionic design, inspection/monitoring

evidence.snippet:
● EvoLogics’ Poggy AUV is a cutting-edge autonomous underwater vehicle designed for advanced surveying, marine exploration and monitoring.
Inspired by nature, Poggy’s innovative bionic design leverages Fin-Ray® technology to deliver unmatched mobility and control in underwater environments.

items.name: Underwater Acoustic Modems (S2C series)
items.product_type: underwater acoustic modems and USBL transceivers — multiple series (7/17 through 120/180)

items.name: USBL Buoy
items.product_type: plug-and-play surface gateway for underwater asset tracking

evidence.snippet:
The EvoLogics USBL Buoy is a fully integrated, plug-and-play surface gateway for real-time tracking of underwater assets: all in one single, compact unit with GNSS and wireless connection to operator software.
](/underwater-acoustics/usbl-buoy)

items.name: Diver Navigation System
items.product_type: turnkey navigation and communication system for professional diver teams

evidence.snippet:
Diver Navigation
Our turnkey solution for professional diver teams provides precise map-based navigation, real-time positioning and text-based communication for increased mission awareness and streamlined coordination.

ndaa.notes: No NDAA Section 848/889 compliance claim found anywhere in the corpus. EvoLogics is a German company (GmbH).

blue_uas.notes: No Blue UAS / Blue sUAS claim found anywhere in the corpus.

evidence.snippet: Building on these foundations, EvoLogics advanced the Quadroin platform from prototypes to serial production with optimized internal layout, updated propulsion and navigation systems, and expanded payload capacity. The current Quadroin generation features a side-scan sonar, full-HD camera, and onboard AI-processing for object recognition and collision avoidance, with advanced communication and navigation systems supporting complex underwater operations.

readiness.notes: Quadroin explicitly in serial production; acoustic modems sold as catalog SKUs across multiple series; Poggy described as market-ready.

tagline: Berlin-based manufacturer of underwater autonomous vehicles (Quadroin, Poggy AUVs; Sonobot 5 USV), acoustic modems (S2C series from micro to full-size), and subsea positioning/navigation systems. Primary markets are survey, research, and infrastructure monitoring. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown; public evidence of US defense or allied-nation programs is limited. Considered production-ready across product lines.
